DP_addition.315.0000:
Hey! I’ve been waiting for you!
Welcome to the Sinnoh region!\f
This is a region of great natural beauty
where Pokémon that have never been\f
seen before can be found! Follow me!
I’ll walk you through Jubilife City!\f
DP_addition.315.0001:
You’ll find a cave if you walk straight
down this road.\r
You should go there and check it out!\f
DP_addition.315.0002:
You’ll find a cave if you walk straight
down this road.\r
You should go there and check it out!\f
DP_addition.315.0003:
A Pokémon Watch is for all Trainers!
We call it a Pokétch for short!\f
DP_addition.315.0004:
There are various Pokétch apps
that you can add to it!
DP_addition.315.0005:
[0103,0000] obtained the Digital Watch
Pokétch app!\f
DP_addition.315.0006:
Wow! You’ve done a great job.\f
I can sense that you could be a truly
great Pokémon Trainer.\f
You have the Thorn Pokémon ROSELIA.
Some Pokémon that haven’t evolved in\f
other regions might evolve here in
the Sinnoh region.\f
Hmm... Let’s see what happens with
your ROSELIA...\f
DP_addition.315.0007:
Wow! You’ve done a great job.\f

DP_addition.315.0008:
A wondrous journey awaits you in
the Sinnoh region!\f
DP_addition.315.0009:
A wondrous journey awaits you in
the Sinnoh region!
DP_addition.315.0010:
Thank you for playing!\f
We will see you again at the launch of\r
Pokémon Diamond and Pokémon Pearl!

DP_addition.315.0013:
这里是祝庆市
汇聚众人的幸福之城
DP_addition.315.0016:
Trainer Tip!\f
All Pokémon that are involved in
a battle earn Exp. Points!\f
When those Exp. Points reach a certain
amount, the Pokémon levels up\r
and becomes stronger!
DP_addition.315.0017:
Trainer Tip!\f
A Pokémon’s health is called its
Hit Points (HP).\f
Be careful: if your Pokémon’s HP hits 0,
it will no longer be able to battle!
DP_addition.315.0018:
This is the end of the demo version.

We look forward to seeing you again soon!
